page: Microsoft Azure NC80adis_H100_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance belonging to the NCadsH100v5 server family. Powered by an x86_64 AMD processor, this server provides 80 dedicated virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration includes 640.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the instance is equipped with 2.0 GPUs. Local storage resources are substantial, featuring 7942 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is fully capable of utilizing Premium Storage. This combination of high-capacity local storage and dedicated GPU accelerators supports data-intensive operations without relying solely on external network storage.

Given its isolated architecture, high vCPU count, large memory footprint, and dual GPU accelerators, this server is designed for demanding workloads. It is highly suitable for machine learning training, large-scale AI inference, high-performance computing, and complex database operations. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the isolated nature and high resource density of this hardware profile position it as a specialized, high-tier resource for enterprise-grade tasks requiring dedicated compute and acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure NC80adis_H100_v5 is an isolated virtual machine from the NCadsH100v5 family, featuring an x86_64 AMD processor with 80 dedicated vCPUs. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the instance is configured with 640.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 2.0 GPU accelerators and 7942 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. This high-density hardware profile is optimized for intensive parallel processing tasks. The server is well-suited for workloads such as machine learning model training, large-scale artificial intelligence inference, high-performance computing, and data-intensive database operations requiring isolated, dedicated physical resources.
